query:
UPDATE training_sets ts
SET 
  cyclesCompleted = (SELECT MAX(cycleNumber) FROM cycle_history WHERE trainingSetId = ts.id),
  bestAccuracy = (SELECT MAX(accuracy) FROM cycle_history WHERE trainingSetId = ts.id),
  lastPlayedAt = (SELECT MAX(completedAt) FROM cycle_history WHERE trainingSetId = ts.id),
  totalAttempts = (SELECT SUM(totalPuzzles) FROM cycle_history WHERE trainingSetId = ts.id)
WHERE id IN (SELECT DISTINCT trainingSetId FROM cycle_history);
